description: Celebrate and enhance your femininity with these glitzy sandals from catwalk. With their shiny metallic hues and sleek design, this pair is perfect for weddings and festivals.heels: 3"UpperSynthetic leather upper with strategically cut out strap for the forefoot for enhanced comfort Glitter pasted onto the forefoot strapsSoft footbed for instep comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with kitten heel for enhanced grip and tractionSandal careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
